steps.title: Identify what weakens an origin claim
steps.content: The claim concludes PR guinea pigs came from Colombia based on trade routes. To directly weaken a claim about origin, we need genetic evidence showing they descended from a different population.

steps.title: Apply genetic evidence to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A shows ancient PR guinea pigs were genetically more similar to Peruvian than Colombian ones—the strongest evidence they descended from Peru, not Colombia.

Choices B and C address cultural artifacts without revealing origin; choice D mentions population size, which doesn't determine descent.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
